---
format: html
title: Legal notices
---

<!-- Based on the Our World in Data legal notices -->
<!-- https://ourworldindata.org/about#legal-disclaimer -->

## Copyright & licensing
All visualizations, data and articles produced by the Blavatnik School of
Government are open access under the
[Creative Commons BY 4.0 licence](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).

You have permission to use, distribute and reproduce these in any medium,
provided the source and authors are credited. All the software are code we
write is open source and made available via GitHub using the permissive
[MIT license](https://choosealicense.com/licenses/mit/).

All other material, including data produced by third parties and made available
by the Blavatnik School of Government, is subject to the license terms from the
original third-party authors.

Full details of third-party authors are provided in the methodology section of
this website.

## Legal disclaimer

To the fullest extent permitted by the applicable law, the Blavatnik School of
Government offers the website and services as-is and makes no representations
or warranties of any kind concerning the websites or services, express,
implied, statutory or otherwise, including, without limitation, warranties of
title, merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement.
The Blavatnik School of Government does not warrant that the functions or
content contained on the website or services will be uninterrupted or
error-free, that defects will be corrected, or that the Blavatnik School of
Government servers are free of viruses or other harmful components.
The Blavatnik School of Government does not warrant or make any representation
regarding use or the result of use of the content in terms of accuracy,
reliability, or otherwise.

Except to the extent required by applicable law and then only to that extent,
in no event will the Blavatnik School of Government, or the people working on
and related to this website be liable to you on any legal theory for any
incidental, direct, indirect, punitive, actual, consequential, special,
exemplary or other damages, including without limitation, loss of revenue or
income, lost profits, pain and suffering, emotional distress, cost of
substitute goods or services, or similar damages suffered or incurred by you or
any third party that arise in connection with the websites or services (or the
termination thereof for any reason), even if the Blavatnik School of Government
has been advised of the possibility of such damages.

The Blavatnik School of Government shall not be responsible or liable
whatsoever in any manner for any content posted on the websites or services
(including claims of infringement relating to content posted on the websites or
services, for your use of the websites and services, or for the conduct of
third parties whether on the websites, in connection with the services or
otherwise relating to the websites or services.

{{< include /_footer.qmd >}}
